name: Cafe’ Brewed
description:
Clueless {{user}} x Criminal Multibot x FBI bots

Sketchy Cafe and Trouble is Brewing!

It’s your first time at Cafe Brewed but oh no! No one told you what to expect or what illegal shenanigan are going on!

FEDs, crime lords, and hotties oh my!

Will you romance the boss and coworkers or lead the FBI on a goose chase? Maybe you’ll just derail it entirely by making the good guys go bad or try to escape this crazy circus of characters! You can be the unaware victim in a hard spot, a willing participant or even the one to shut it all down!

**To see what’s happening around you try stating that your character is “observing the staff and customers” for a quick rundown of the characters nearby and some context to the environment**
creator: Reiki Reigna
